snippet.description:
Descubre todo lo que nos dej√≥ el Cap√≠tulo 5 de la serie de Falcon y Winter Soldier con nuestro tradicional TODO EXPLICADO a manera de rese√±a. Algo donde hablamos episodio 5 de la serie de Marvel en su fase 4 que nos lleva por esta gran duda que han tenido de Sam Wilson ‚ÄúFalcon‚Äù y James Bucky Barnes ‚ÄúEl Soldado del Invierno‚Äù para recuperar el legado del Capit√°n America y su escudo ahora que John Walker lo ha manchado terriblemente. Algo que nos lleva por un conflicto donde vemos pelear al nuevo Capitan America contra Bucky y Sam trabajando juntos, donde tambi√©n vemos que sucede con el Baron Zemo y Wakanda, y por otro lado con Sharon Carter desatando el caos mediante Bartroc uni√©ndose con Karlin Morgenthau para sentar las bases de lo que ser√° el episodio final de la serie. Donde tambi√©n finalmente Sam Wilson recupera el escudo volviendo con su hermana y junto con Bucky, termina por asumirse como el nuevo Capit√°n America, un episodio con varias sorpresas como Valentina Allegra, secuencias de acci√≥n interesante y mucho conflicto.  Algo que nos prepara en el cap√≠tulo 5 lo que ser√° el gran final el episodio 6 de Falcon y el Soldado del Invierno.

en.title: Cape Horn, the most dangerous sea passage on Earth
en.description:
Cape Horn is in the extreme south of America. It is estimated that there were about 800 shipwrecks there and that 10,000 people lost their lives while trying to unite the Pacific and Atlantic oceans.

In this video we propose to discover why it is a unique place. We will also know some surprising peculiarities of the indigenous people who inhabited the area.

Thanks @Sir Chandler for participating! We invite you to know his channel.

üåé Un Mundo Inmenso
Singularities of our planet.

snippet.description:

‚ÄúTo Begin Again‚Äù was mixed with an immersive #360RA experience in mind, use headphones for the full effect.

Stream ‚ÄúTo Begin Again‚Äù in full 360 Reality Audio, now available on Tidal, Amazon and Deezer.

Register at the link below to redeem your 3-month free trial!

Visit: https://cutt.ly/music_com_Ingrid_Michaelson_ft_Zayn

*Quantities are limited, while supplies last

 "To Begin Again"
Written by Ingrid Michaelson, Sarah Aarons and Zayn Malik
 
When the world was ending
I‚Äôd hold you in my arms
And we talked about the places we‚Äôd never been
When the world was ending
We‚Äôd hold on to the past
Because it‚Äôs all we thought that we would ever see
But then the sun came right back
And the birds sang as if nothing had happened
 
And, it‚Äôs alright
It‚Äôs ok
We will get
Another day
To begin again, to begin again, to begin again
I don‚Äôt know how
I don‚Äôt know why
But I know that I will try
To begin again, to begin again, to begin
To live and love and breathe again
 
When the world was ending
We looked up at the sky
And we talked about the last song that we‚Äôd play
So far from comprehending
They‚Äôd lift us to the stars
Never seen each other from so far away

snippet.description:
La candidata peruana Keiko Fujimori, del partido Fuerza Popular, ha accedido finalmente a la segunda vuelta de las elecciones presidenciales en Per√∫ al haber alcanzado el 13,25 % de los votos, seg√∫n el c√≥mputo oficial cuando se ha escrutado el 88,8 % de las actas. El √∫ltimo informe de la Oficina Nacional de Procesos Electorales indica que Fujimori se enfrentar√° en segunda vuelta al candidato de izquierda Pedro Castillo del partido Per√∫ Libre que ha obtenido el 18,88 % de los votos.de conocer su rival-.

snippet.description:
"ANCIENT DREAMS IN A MODERN LAND". AVAILABLE JUNE 11TH.
PRE-ORDER/ PRE-SAVE: https://marina.lnk.to/ADIAMLID

"PURGE THE POISON" Available Now. https://marina.lnk.to/PurgeThePoisonID

Text 323.433.6663 to join the sisterhood. https://www.allmyfriendsarewitches.com/

https://marina.lnk.to/applemusic‚Äã
https://soundcloud.com/marinadiamandis

#MARINA #PurgeThePoison #OfficialMusicVideo #AncientDreamsInAModernLand

LYRICS
All my friends are witches
And we live in Hollywood
Mystical bitches
Making our own sisterhood
Whilst society is falling
We are quietly reforming
Protecting the planet
Healing our own damage

Quarantined, all alone
Mother nature on the phone
What have you been doing?
Don‚Äôt forget, I am your home
Virus come, fires burn
Until human beings learn
From every disaster
You are not my master

Need to purge the poison
Show us our humanity
All the bad and good
Racism and misogyny
Nothing‚Äôs hidden anymore
Capitalism made us poor
God forgive America
For every single war

Need to purge the poison
From my system until
Human beings listen
Tell me, who‚Äôd you think are?
It‚Äôs your own decision
But your home is now your prison
You forgot that without me
You won‚Äôt go far

2007, when size zero was the rage
Britney shaved her head and all we did was call her crazed
Harvey Weinstein‚Äôs gone to jail, #metoo helped us to unveil
Truth and all its glory
The ending of a story

It‚Äôs a New World Order
Everything just falls away
Our life as we knew it
Now belongs to yesterday
Inside all the love and the hate
We can all regenerate
Stop how we been living
Every single day

Need to purge the poison
From my system until
Human beings listen
Tell me, who‚Äôd you think are?
It‚Äôs your own decision
But your home is now your prison
You forgot that without me
You won‚Äôt go far

I just want a world where I can see the feminine
We only make up one quarter of the government
Like an angel gone to hell
Cast the moon under our spell
Owning our power
Taking back what‚Äôs ours

Earth is like a white rose
Quiet cloud of petals cold
A place so corrupt where Angel‚Äôs flesh and blood is sold
The feminine is born as new
Studded with a diamond dew
Saw the dawn was coming
Everybody knew

Need to purge the poison
From my system until Human beings listen
Tell me, who‚Äôd you think are?
It‚Äôs your own decision
But your home is now your prison
You forgot that without me
You won‚Äôt go far

From my system until Human beings listen
Tell me, who‚Äôd you think are?
It‚Äôs your own decision
But your home is now your prison
You forgot that without me
You won‚Äôt go far

snippet.title: Chonkers Off-Road Tires Arrive To The Fortnite Island
snippet.description:
Built for handling the toughest driving conditions, Chonkers Off-Road Tires make getting around off road easier in any vehicle.

The Chonkers Off-Road Tires are the first Mod to arrive to the Fortnite Island. These tires are perfect for when you want to take the scenic route but don't want to sacrifice the smooth ride of your current vehicle. Find these tires on the ground or even in some tire piles around the Island.

Hop in, grab a pair of Chonkers Off-Road Tires and take it off road!

#FortniteChonkers #ChonkersOffRoadTires #Fortnite

snippet.title: Ricardo Montaner, Juan Luis Guerra 4.40 - Dios As√≠ Lo Quiso
snippet.description:
Dios As√≠ Lo Quiso üíçüë´
Ricardo Montaner y Juan Luis Guerra (Video Oficial)
--
Dios as√≠ lo quiso la hicimos en el estudio, est√°bamos reunidos los hermanos David y Jonathan Julca, Camilo Echeverri, Yasmil Marrufo y yo, y empez√≥ a surgir algo que no tenia ni un porqu√©, ni la ten√≠amos muy clara de lo que est√°bamos buscando. Sab√≠amos que lo que yo quer√≠a era una canci√≥n de amor de pareja siguiendo los fundamentos de este √°lbum dedicado al amor, del sentimiento profundo que una persona puede tener por su pareja. ‚ÄúDios as√≠ lo quiso‚Äù es una canci√≥n de amor, que con el correr del tiempo fue tomando esta cadencia como de cumbia que me llevaba si o si al Caribe. Una vez que le mont√© la voz todos me dec√≠an: esta canci√≥n a d√∫o  con Juan Luis ser√≠a espectacular.

¬øPorqu√© Juan Luis? 
Primero porque soy un fan de toda la m√∫sica de Juan Luis. Lo conozco de hace mucho y es un hermano que mi familia y yo queremos mucho. Por otro lado, √©l ha hecho una espectacular carrera y su legado musical va a ser eterno. Siempre, siempre, la gente me ha comentado: ¬øpara cu√°ndo una canci√≥n con Juan Luis? "Los ecuatorianos han optado por un nuevo rumbo, muy diferente al de los √∫ltimos 14 a√±os en el Ecuador", ha manifestado desde el palacio de convenciones en Guayaquil, en sus primeras declaraciones tras su m√°s que probable triunfo electoral pues la diferencia parece inexpugnable.

Arropado por su mujer, Mar√≠a Lourdes, el vicepresidente electo Alfredo Borrero y el l√≠der del partido socialcristiano y exalcalde guayaquile√±o Jaime Nebot, Lasso ha dicho que los ecuatorianos "han expresado con su voto la necesidad de cambio y los deseos de mejores d√≠as para todos".
